calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion By Defendant United Parcel Service, Inc. For Pain Management Examination Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar May-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.'S Motion For Pain Management Examination Of Plaintiff is granted. Defendant has presented good cause for a pain management examination. See Liao Decl., 2:10-12. The fact that the recommendation by Dr. Kim does not appear in her written report does not mean that Dr. Kim did not make the recommendation. Order signed. Judge Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion By Defendant United Parcel Service, Inc. For Pain Management Examination Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Continued To May-15-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sanford Cipinko of Law Offices of Sanford M. Cipinko telephone number 415-693-9905 for Plaintiff.
Judy Liao of Maranga Morgenstern telephone number 415-248-5315 for Defendant.

Counsel for the Plaintiff did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. The Court did not adopt the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.'S Motion For Pain Management Examination Of Plaintiff is continued to May 15, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
